title: lysimachia glaucina
intro: Lysimachia glaucina, also known as Chinese money plant or white moneywort, is a perennial herb native to China and Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lysimachia glaucina include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
